lossItems.downstreamRisk: Vendor-private agronomic or equipment detail may not survive normalization into governed OFARM semantics.
lossItems.mitigation: Retain the original source payload as evidence and expose unsupported attributes in the mapping trace.

lossItems.mitigation: Keep original note text and record approximation posture in the import trace.
